special_mechanics.name: Grid-Based Tactical Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses 2D grid-based tactical combat system rather than real-time platformer movement

special_mechanics.name: Dragon Companion AI
special_mechanics.description: Dragons controlled by game AI with general guidelines ('Go!' or 'Wait!') rather than direct player control. Dragons act as independent creatures with own behavior patterns

special_mechanics.name: Dragon Evolution System
special_mechanics.description: Dragons evolve into different types by feeding them weapons, armor, accessories, and items. Food preference affects loyalty and power

tier_notes: Bahamut Lagoon is a tactical RPG with grid-based turn-based combat, not a platformer. No character movement physics (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are documented. The game focuses on squad-based tactical positioning and dragon companion mechanics rather than player character kinematic parameters.
